backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (HeroSection redesign, WhyChooseUsSection redesign, and others) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, border, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta, page title 'AKS Digital Media Solutions', and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering Header, HeroSection, AboutSection, ServicesSection, WhyChooseUsSection, TestimonialsSection, ContactSection, and Footer in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutCreatorSect: Empty file with no exported component or content.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column About section with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, AKS brand description, Mission/Vision/Approach highlight cards, and a decorative about image with fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with a controlled form (name, email, message) that simulates submission with a success state, plus contact info cards for location, email, and WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/FAQSection.tsx: Empty file with no exported component or content.
Empty file with no exported component or content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Dark navy footer with AKS logo, tagline, quick nav links, services list, contact details, four social media icon links, copyright year, and smooth-scroll navigation handlers.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with smooth-scroll links, a logo with fallback, a CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu that toggles on scroll.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dark background image, overlay gradients, headline, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ProductPreviewSe: Empty file with no content or exports.
Displays a 3-column grid of six digital marketing services (SEO, Social Media, Ads, Lead Gen, Web Design, Branding) with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Renders three client testimonial cards with star ratings, quotes, and client info in a responsive grid with scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/WhatYouGetSectio: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Dark-themed section listing four business benefits in a 2-column grid with gold-accented cards, hover effects, and scroll-triggered slide-in animations.
frontend/src/components/WhyThisKitSectio: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the AKS Blue & Gold theme including colors, gradients, and scroll animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with AKS brand color tokens (navy, gold, blue variants), custom fonts, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the AKS Digital Media Solutions business website, including its color theme, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements.
